steps.title: Find the transmission gap
steps.content: Some Euro-American farmers used Haudenosaunee techniques, but few had seen Haudenosaunee farms. The passage also rules out independent reinvention. That leaves indirect transmission as the strongest explanation.

steps.title: Reject unrelated explanations
steps.content: Choice B discusses crop suitability rather than how the techniques spread. Choice C extends the claim to other regions without evidence. Choice D contradicts the early-nineteenth-century timing. The remaining explanation is learning from people more directly influenced by Haudenosaunee practices. The answer is A.
